response.justification: Candidate has strong geospatial domain experience through GISCollective and solid distributed/low-latency systems work at Sociomantic, which align well with routing pipeline needs. However, the core C++ requirement is weakly met: only ~6 months of commercial C/C++ at National Instruments over a decade ago, with no recent modern C++ or Rust experience. The bulk of recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. Worth a screening conversation to assess C++ depth and willingness to retool, but not a strong on-paper match.
strengths: Founder of GISCollective — direct geospatial/GIS platform experience relevant to routing tiles
Built low-latency, high-throughput services at Sociomantic (millions of req/sec) with async I/O and caching
Strong systems breadth (Linux, distributed services, embedded) and demonstrated ability to learn new stacks
concerns: Modern C++ commercial experience is minimal and over 10 years stale; no Rust experience listed
No navigation guidance / routing-specific product experience
Recent work skews heavily to TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than the required systems languages
